assumptions: No Camunda account, Camunda software, local engine, deployed model, process instance, or custom code is assumed.
A supported Mac, Linux, or Windows computer, browser, file-unzip capability, terminal, JDK 21 through 25, network connection, and local execution permission are available.
No package was downloaded, local service was started, model was deployed, or process instance was executed during research.

developer_goal: Start without a Camunda account or local installation, download the official package, start Camunda 8 locally, deploy and run the supplied Rocket Launch BPMN model with the documented successful input, and verify the completed instance and result variables in Operate.

first_success.outcome: The supplied Rocket Launch BPMN process runs locally to successful completion with the documented `Odyssey` mission and `fuelLevel` of 95.
first_success.observable_signal: Operate shows the process instance completed successfully, and its Variables panel includes the generated destination, remaining fuel, and mission result; with fuel level 95, the documented logic selects Venus and five experiments.

route_selection.surface: Camunda 8 local Rocket Launch first BPMN process
route_selection.rule: Select the lexicographically shortest complete official route to the same first-success outcome after fixing product intent; if peer routes remain consequential, mark needs-human-judgment.

candidates.name: Camunda 8 local Rocket Launch first BPMN process
candidates.reason: Recorded as a reconstructable candidate, but public evidence does not close signup-field opacity and/or peer-route lexicographic selection for a verified count.

candidates.name: First Spring Boot or Node.js project
candidates.reason: This route is for developers implementing service workers and adds a language and framework choice after the general no-code BPMN starting route.

candidates.name: Build your first AI agent
candidates.reason: The AI-agent guide is a specialized second card rather than the first general getting-started project.

candidates.name: Camunda 8 SaaS
candidates.reason: The getting-started page explicitly starts with a local project, avoiding a hosted account and organization path.

required_path.action: Obtain and install the prerequisites required by the selected Camunda candidate route.

required_fields.label: Install or download choices
required_fields.notes: Exact installer, OS, version, or package selectors are release-dependent or peer-branched.

required_path.observable_result: The developer has a runnable environment for the selected candidate.

required_path.action: Follow the documented commands for the selected Camunda first-success candidate through its terminal verification.
required_path.observable_result: Operate shows the process instance completed successfully, and its Variables panel includes the generated destination, remaining fuel, and mission result; with fuel level 95, the documented logic selects Venus and five experiments.

prerequisites.description: {'order': 1, 'type': 'software', 'requirement': 'Install JDK 21 through 25, which Camunda 8 Run requires to start the local engine.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S1']}

{'order': 2, 'type': 'software', 'requirement': 'Be able to download and unzip the Camunda 8 Getting Started Package and run its operating-system-specific startup script.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S1']}
{'order': 3, 'type': 'environment', 'requirement': 'Have a browser and local access to `http://localhost:8080/operate`.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S1']}

external_gates.description: The local runtime requires JDK 21 through 25.
The developer must download and unzip the Getting Started Package containing the runtime, Modeler, and example.
Startup and optional shutdown commands differ between Windows and Mac or Linux.

unavoidable_waits.description: Package download, image pull, or local service startup time for the selected install route.

platform_outcomes.description: Run your first BPMN process with Camunda 8.

excluded.item: Running additional fuel scenarios, comparing canceled instances, studying the FEEL and DMN implementation, stopping the local runtime, adding service workers, building an AI agent, orchestrating human
excluded.reason: Listed as excluded after success in the source record.

evidence_supported: Supporting official evidence for Get started with Camunda | Camunda 8 Docs

uncertainties.question: What exact current required signup, identity, legal, and entitlement fields does Camunda show for a new developer, and which peer route is the lexicographic shortest path?
uncertainties.impact: Without those fields and a closed route choice, action and field counts cannot be verified for peer comparison.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated read-only walkthrough of the live signup and the selected post-login first-success path, with screenshots of required fields and confirmation that peer routes are longer or gated.
